---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's missing today?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work? Be as specific as you can.

## Component

Which part of ERNE does this affect?

- [ ] Agent (new or improved)
- [ ] Command (new slash command)
- [ ] Skill (new knowledge module)
- [ ] Rule (new or updated convention)
- [ ] Hook (new check or profile)
- [ ] MCP Config (new integration)
- [ ] IDE Config (CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, etc.)
- [ ] CLI (init, update commands)
- [ ] Website (erne.dev)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you think about?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, links, examples, or references that help explain the request.
